name: io.github.timwal78/mcp-x402
description: 43+ MCP tools covering SEC filings, squeeze signals, options flow, FTD data, XRPL/Base payments, agent identity, memecoin launchpad, copy-trading, web crawling, and BYOK LLM proxy. Pay per call via x402 micropayments — no API keys, no subscriptions.

environment_variables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environment_variables.description: Transport mode. Use 'sse' for HTTP server mode.

environment_variables.name: SML_PAYMENT_RECEIVER
environment_variables.description: USDC Base address to receive payments from agent tool calls.

environment_variables.name: WALLET_SEED
environment_variables.description: BIP-39 mnemonic for the server wallet. Auto-generated if not set.
